{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description= John designed this Snail Shell to sell hot pots to Snail, and it somehow became a combat item.
|affct=CIV
|hard=ATK
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.8%)
|color=green
|earth=2
|water=2
|fire=0
|wind=2
|form=Mutant
|element=Fire
|realm=Murika
|orangehard=HP
}}
